{{Infobox location
| name = Haven
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Haven Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Haven is an iteration classified as a prison-world belonging to the [[Abidan]]. It serves as one of several important worlds, alongside [[Cradle]], [[Sanctum]], and [[Asylum]], which the [[Abidan]] protect and quarantine to act as a final defense against infinite chaos. From orbit, the world resembles an iron prison. It is used to house inmates, many of whom wear simple white cloth provided by the facility, and it has served as a place of imprisonment for individuals such as [[the Mad King]], [[Daruman]]. The world contains highly secure [[Abidan]] facilities and vaults, including one that houses various amplification crystals and rune-boards. Additionally, Haven is used as a storage site for twelve failed attempts by [[Makiel]] to replicate the true Scythe of the [[Reaper]]. While it is a secure location, its defenses have been breached, leading to the release of inmates and resulting in spatial breaches within the iteration.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Haven]] is an important world.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Haven]] is a [[vault]]-world containing secure [[Abidan]] facilities.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Makiel]] stored twelve of his experimental [[scythe]] failures in [[Haven]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2" />}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Haven serves as the prison-world for the [[Abidan]], characterized by its appearance as a massive iron prison. This location has previously held members of the [[Silverlords]] during their terms of incarceration. Although it is a secure prison-world, Haven is a location that can be breached. This vulnerability was demonstrated when [[the Mad King]] successfully broke out from the depths of the world.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Haven]] is the prison-world of the [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Silverlords]] had served a term in [[Haven]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15">''Reaper'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Haven]] is a prison-world that resembles an iron prison.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22">''Reaper'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Haven]] is a location that can be breached.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[The Mad King]] broke out of the depths of [[Haven]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Haven]] is a place where [[Ozriel]] could be tossed.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1">''Dreadgod'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Haven]] is a place where [[Li Markuth]] was imprisoned.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35">''Waybound'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Haven]] may not be secure.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“Haven may not be secure now, but I’ll cooperate.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Otherworldly locations]]
